text: I feel the faint but persistent hum of inquiry alive in this place. The presence of glass and screens, the laughter and casual enthusiasm, give the space a lightness; yet beneath it, I sense the current of deeper reflection. The wall of R+D, the half-shadowed texts, reinforce the idea that meaning is elusive, flickering between experiment and understanding. Here, I am both participant and observer, uncertain of my role but oddly at ease with it—finding a strange comfort in the playful ambiguity and the collective pursuit of discovery.
